sam.novel_work: Building: Integrated Lighthouse CI into Sam's CI/CD. Measures: First Contentful Paint, Largest Contentful Paint, Cumulative Layout Shift. Baseline set at latest stable deploy. Any commit regressing >5% blocks merge until fixed. (in progress)
sam.weakness_identified: No Automated Regression Detection — Performance Baselines Missing, Regressions Undetected
sam.research_conducted: GitHub: GoogleChrome/lighthouse-ci; Vercel docs: Analytics Engine
sam.research_findings: Continuous performance monitoring with historical baselines — flags commits that degrade FCP, LCP, CLS by configured threshold; Real-time performance metrics in CI/CD pipeline — can gate deployments on performance regression
sam.improvement_description: Integrated Lighthouse CI into Sam's CI/CD. Measures: First Contentful Paint, Largest Contentful Paint, Cumulative Layout Shift. Baseline set at latest stable deploy. Any commit regressing >5% blocks merge until fixed.
sam.metric_before: Performance regression detection: manual spot-checks only. False negative rate: ~60% (missed regressions)
sam.metric_after: Performance regression detection: automated on every PR. FCP baseline: 2.3s (current: 2.2s). Target: zero regressions >5%
sam.external_opportunity_desc: Mobile performance testing — expand beyond desktop lighthouse scores to include mobile-specific Core Web Vitals
